source_label: arXiv 2309.06180 ‚Äî Efficient Memory Management for Large Language Model Serving with PagedAttention
notes: vLLM's core attention algorithm, named after OS virtual-memory PAGING. Two parts: "paged" + "attention". STRESS: PAYJD uh-TEN-shun. The hazard is "paged" ‚Äî it is /pe…™d íd/ (rhymes with "caged", one syllable, voiced -jd cluster), NOT two-syllable "page-ed". From the verb "to page" the KV cache into fixed-size blocks. Common in inference-infra discussion 2023-2026.
